summary: Revoke the default PUBLIC EXECUTE grant from the project platform-role synchronization function.

notes: Production pre-deploy grant assertions found public.psa_sync_project_platform_roles(bigint[]) still exposed to PUBLIC.
Migration 117 revokes PUBLIC/anon and grants execute only to authenticated and service_role.
Migration 116 now includes the same revoke for fresh installs.

verification: Run static project-role platform sync migration coverage check.
Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.14.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.14.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
The frontend render smoke currently does not display the version on the unauthenticated login screen; server pre-deploy verifies the expected version in the app bundle.
